description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. He is dressed in a loose, short-sleeved tunic that falls to mid-thigh, and a pair of shorts that are visible beneath the tunic. His feet are bare, and his legs are exposed from the knees down. The figure has short, textured hair and defined facial features. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday pedestrian suitable for urban environments. The surface of the figure is matte, with visible shading and simplified anatomical details.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a loose tunic and shorts, standing upright with arms outstretched and bare feet. The figure has short hair and a casual, everyday appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full extension of both arms, with the tunic and shorts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the drape of the tunic, and the bare feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, tunic, and legs, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the tunic's side, and the bare feet.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
